channel.title: My personal blog
channel.description: This is my personal blog to capture my various thoughts

item.title: Hello Blog!
item.dc:creator: Drasken
item.description:
Hello World post to open my blog.

This will be a very low active blog. I always wrote something but I decided to open this blog to share some of the things I'd like to let public, in the open.

While at it I used the opportunity to use Python again and to test Nikola to make a blog. The first init step was quite good so far.
